SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-14-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-14-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. PLAINTIFF MARINA OSTMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MODERN ANIMAL, INC. IS PRESENT BY DR. MARIE-CHARLOTTE POPP DVM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-14-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSTMAN, MARINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MODERN ANIMAL, INC. $867.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,017.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MODERN ANIMAL, INC.
